definition.meaning: A human being, any individual; an individual's character or part played in life
definition.origin: From Old French persone, from Latin persona

definition.meaning: Actor's mask; character in a play; human being, individual; assumed identity
definition.origin: Possibly from Etruscan phersu "mask". Traditional folk etymology connects to personare "to sound through" (mask amplifying voice), but the long 'o' makes this unlikely.

definition.note: Probable ultimate origin of Latin persona

definition.meaning: One of the persons of the Trinity; parish priest, parson
definition.usage: Theological use; also applied to a clergyman holding church office

definition.meaning: Pertaining to a person, individual, private
duine: person, human being (native term); pearsa: person (borrowed from Latin/English)
definition.origin: duine from Old Irish duine, from Proto-Celtic *doniyo- "person"

definition.meaning: "To follow" — root of socius (companion), relevant to person as social being
